description: Mercury is the closest planet from the Sun. The side facing the sun is extremely hot, whereas the other side is incredibly cold. The temperatures range from -150 C to 425. Without your spacesuit, you’d either freeze or instantly turn into a carbon brick, depending on which side of the planet you were standing on.Without any gear, you would survive for less than 2 minutes.✩VenusIt is a real hell.The temperature on its surface is approximately 400 C. Its surface pressure is also about 90 times greater than that of Earth. A spacesuit designed for Venus would need to be constructed of titanium. Without a spacesuit, one would get squashed in seconds, if you didn’t get turned into dust.✩Earth:Thanks to the wonderful atmosphere, food and water, and everything else that makes our home planet liveable, you can get in a good 80 or more years here. Earth is perfect for us.✩MarsIt is very cold, but the atmosphere is very thin ‘Tyson says, “so the intensity of the cold won’t be as biting as it might otherwise feel at that temperature on Earth.”✩ JupiterJupiter is literally just a ball of gas with a solid core. So there’s nothing to land on. If you were to jump on it, you would just descend into nothingness. The gases inside this giant are highly pressurized, so without any gear, you would get crushed instantly, i.e., in less than 1 second.✰✰✰ Just like Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune are enormous balls of gas. description: “I was a 28-year-old happy man, who would go to work in the morning & eat Maa ke haath ka roti in the evening. It was just Papa, Maa, & me. But covid snatched it all. It was 2020. First, I lost my job & then…I lost my parents. The next few months after their death were the toughest. I didn’t go anywhere, talk to anyone or eat anything. I remained within the 4 walls of my house. I fell into depression.I couldn’t stay in that house anymore. So, the moment covid got over, I shifted to a PG. I took up multiple jobs. In the morning I sold pamphlets & in the evening I worked as a waiter. But at night all the memories would come flashing back. I would often wake up to wet pillows.Thankfully, that’s when I came across a video of artists performing on the streets. This intrigued me & I saw the maximum crowd among the mascots. This way I could be closer to people. So, I decided to give it a try. I spent hours searching for the perfect outfit online…& I decided to become a ‘Teddy.’Many people asked me, ‘Why Teddy?’ But the 1 thing I needed the most at the time was a warm hug…& isn’t that what teddies do? Give the best hugs? I knew what I was doing was completely insane, but I just went with my gut feeling.So, in 2020 I began…it was difficult to breathe & the heat gave me rashes & allergies. But 1 day, a kid hugged me & said, ‘Hi Teddy Man. Aapko pata hai aaj school mei kya hua?’ And then he narrated everything that happened to him in school. That day, I became the ‘Teddy Man.’It’s been 4 years since. Every day I meet multiple kids, some give me a fist bump, some call me the ‘Yellow Man’ & some just talk. In between all this I have healed. It’s not like I haven’t had bad days. There were days when drunk men have slapped me & run away with my money,But I live for the days when an old uncle sits & tells me about his day, or when a foreigner clicks a photo with me because it’s her first time in Bombay, or simply when a passerby gives me his bottle of water.This 1 avatar has given me a 2nd chance at life. I’m doing this for myself…because everyday, this job is giving me the family I lost. It is saving me from drowning…It is the reason I am alive today.”

description: Air India's Boeing 747 takes final flight from Mumbai with ‘wing wave’ manoeuvre.Today, one of the former Air India Boeing 747s left Mumbai for the last time. Once registered VT-EVA and named “Agra”, it was de-registered by the DGCA last year after retirement, and its “Air India” titles and logos were removed. Hence a temporary American registration, N940AS was applied to it last week, to permit it to fly out of its former home base, towards an uncertain future.As the clock struck 10:47 AM, the pilots ferrying out the aircraft performed a “Wing Wave”, an aviation tradition reserved for retiring or concluding flights, over the skies of Santa Cruz.   747    747   queen

description: „Pedro“ is a well-known song by Raffaella Carrà, an Italian singer, dancer, and actress, released in 1970. The song tells the story of a young woman named Raffaella who falls in love with an attractive man named Pedro. Pedro is a passionate man from Spain who captures the hearts of women.The song became a major hit, establishing Raffaella Carrà as an international pop icon. „Pedro“ was a huge success in Europe and Latin America, topping the charts and becoming a favorite on dance floors. The catchy melody combined with Latin American rhythms and Carrà’s charismatic voice made the song a pop music classic.„Pedro“ was not only a musical success but also a symbol of the cultural connection between Europe and Latin America in the 1970s. The song inspired numerous cover versions and became a staple of Carrà’s repertoire during her long and successful career. To this day, „Pedro“ is often considered one of Raffaella Carrà’s most famous and beloved songs.

description: الثلاثي المرح عاد إليكم من جديد 😄 رح خبركم شي عن حالي، من انا وصغيرة كانو صحباتي يتمسخروا على المشية تبعي. كنت ازعل لانو هذه هي طبيعة مشيتي بس ولا مرة همني اني اغير حالي كرمالهم…وهلأ من بعد سنين طويلة، البنات بطلو صحباتي وفيديوهات المشي عم ينجحوا على السوشال ميديا 🤔 نصيحة، ما تتغيروا كرمال حدا لانو الشي يلي يميزكم في الصغر رح يضل يميزكم على كبر🥰آخر فيديو على هذا الترند لانو تعبنا مشي 😂 عنجد اكثر ستايل فيديو فاجأني بالتفاعل عليه هو هذا 😄 فيديو قديم على فكرة 🤷🏼‍♀️ قولولي، شو يلي لفتكم بالفيديو؟ 🥰The three musketeers are back at it 😄 here’s something about me, when I was younger my girlfriends used to make fun of my walk. I remember feeling sad about it because that was the nature of my walk. Nevertheless, while their opinion mattered to me, I was never going to change who I am for someone else…needless to say, they are no longer my friends and my “walking” videos are going positively viral on social media 🤷🏼‍♀️ point is, never change for anyone because what make you unique when you are younger will make you standout when you are older 🥰 this will be our last video on this trend coz we are tired from all the walking 😂 its an old video btw🥰 now tell me, what did you like most about this style of videos? 🤔

description: My secret recipe🫶🏼👇🏼1. Compliment: “I couldn’t help but notice your [item]. It looks great! Where did you get it?”2. Find Common Ground: “I overheard you talking about [topic]. I’m interested too. What are your thoughts?”3. Make an Observation: “You seem really good at [activity]. How did you start?”4. Discuss Current Events: “Have you heard about [recent news]? What’s your take on it?”5. Introduce Yourself: “Hi, I’m [name]. We haven’t met before. What brings you here today?”6. Ask About Surroundings: “This [place/event] is interesting, isn’t it? Been here before?”7. Use Humor: “I had to laugh at [something situation-related]. Have you experienced this?”8. Share an Experience: “I just tried [activity]. It was amazing! Have you done this?”9. Seek Opinions: “What’s your opinion on [topic]? I’m curious to know.”10. Praise an Accomplishment: “Congratulations on [accomplishment]! Can you tell me more?”11. Mention a Mutual Connection: “We both know [person]. How do you know them?”12. Offer Help: “Do you need help with [activity]?”13. Recommend a Book/Movie: “I loved [title]. Have you seen/read it? Your thoughts?”14. Inquire About Food/Drink: “Any recommendations on what to order here?”15. Ask a Factual Question: “Do you know anything about [fact/information]?”Keep conversations meaningful by genuinely listening and engaging. Let’s connect more deeply with those around us. 🌟Share this with someone it would help🫂

description: 𝗔 𝗳𝘂𝗿𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗽𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗽𝗵𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘀𝗶𝘀 𝘁𝗼 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗶𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗺, 𝗡𝗶𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺, 𝗘𝘅𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺 & 𝗔𝗯𝘀𝘂𝗿𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗺Life is meaningless. A very common term I've used on my account right? And there's a lot of analysis based on it as well. But how do the philosophical perspectives respond to the statement's rationality?•Stoicism: Even if forgotten, a virtuous life holds intrinsic value. Focus on what you can control and find meaning in the present moment.•Nihilism: Embrace the lack of inherent meaning and create your own through your unique experiences and actions.•Existentialism: Take responsibility for defining your purpose and create meaning through your choices and connections.•Absurdism: Accept the absurdity of a meaningless universe and find joy in living authentically despite the inevitable.Ok, this was more like a theoretical answer, but on my account we don't only focus on Philosophical Questions rather we find an optimal & practical approach to these.Stoicism is good for short term or quick decisions based on the notion. You're stuck in traffic. Rather than getting frustrated, you could use the time to listen to some music or a calming audiobook.Nihilism is good for non competitive social dynamics. You break up with a partner who doesn't share your values. Now you'll seek opportunity to find someone better who actually leans with your ideas & understands your circumstances.Existentialism is the most practical for capitalistic/competitive society. Suppose you do something which barely pays you. You know that in the vast spectrum of suffering what you're doing might be insignificant, but it is what it is. You accept the truth & make your job your purpose.Absurdism is the best for hyper competitive society. You're terrified of public speaking, but you have a presentation at work. You'll accept the inherent absurdity of the situation & focus on delivering the information effectively, you'll build characteristics within you which properly delves the situation. The most rationally optimistic solution.Now ultimately it depends on you. Also I personally don't believe in a particular philosophical believe.

description: About S-400 Defence SystemsS-400 is the most versatile system of its kind in the world.Firstly, it has different envelopes of coverage ranging from 40Km to 400Km distance and 30 feet to one lakh feet of altitude. Virtually there is no aerial vehicle in the world which can travel beyond these limits and hence this system gives a coverage against all the possible threats.Secondly, the entire system is autonomous and does not require human interference unless specifically required. Automatic search, track, target identification, target data sharing over a secure link, assessment of target parameters as well as selection and launch of a suitable counter-vehicle, everything is autonomous.Thirdly, this system can not only share the data with other systems deployed in the vicinity but can also control other Air Defence Systems available and fourthly, it has a very quick deployment and de-induction time. It can be put into action within 5 minutes and with erection of additional antenna, the time becomes maximum 25 minutes. No other system in the world has such low action times.   relations

description: 𝗔 𝗳𝘂𝗿𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗽𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗽𝗵𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘀𝗶𝘀 𝘁𝗼 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗶𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗺, 𝗡𝗶𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺, 𝗘𝘅𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺 & 𝗔𝗯𝘀𝘂𝗿𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗺Life is meaningless. A very common term I've used on my account right? And there's a lot of analysis based on it as well. But how do the philosophical perspectives respond to the statement's rationality?•Stoicism: Even if forgotten, a virtuous life holds intrinsic value. Focus on what you can control and find meaning in the present moment.•Nihilism: Embrace the lack of inherent meaning and create your own through your unique experiences and actions.•Existentialism: Take responsibility for defining your purpose and create meaning through your choices and connections.•Absurdism: Accept the absurdity of a meaningless universe and find joy in living authentically despite the inevitable.Ok, this was more like a theoretical answer, but on my account we don't only focus on Philosophical Questions rather we find an optimal & practical approach to these.Stoicism is good for short term or quick decisions based on the notion. You're stuck in traffic. Rather than getting frustrated, you could use the time to listen to some music or a calming audiobook.Nihilism is good for non competitive social dynamics. You break up with a partner who doesn't share your values. Now you'll seek opportunity to find someone better who actually leans with your ideas & understands your circumstances.Existentialism is the most practical for capitalistic/competitive society. Suppose you do something which barely pays you. You know that in the vast spectrum of suffering what you're doing might be insignificant, but it is what it is. You accept the truth & make your job your purpose.Absurdism is the best for hyper competitive society. You're terrified of public speaking, but you have a presentation at work. You'll accept the inherent absurdity of the situation & focus on delivering the information effectively, you'll build characteristics within you which properly delves the situation. The most rationally optimistic solution.Now ultimately it depends on you. Also I personally don't believe in a particular philosophical believe.

description: 2006,Sada's family lived in a village in Begusarai, India. It was a joint family. All the cousins of this family used to play together. Again parents kept it as a secret for fear of being insulted even after knowing the truth. A few months later, another girl (khushi) went missing from the another family . This family member immediately called the police for investigation. During police investigation, a son of the Sada family (Amarjeet Sada) was continuously staring to the police and laughing .When the police asked Amarjeet to tell them anything, he asked for a packet of biscuits. He was found mentally ill and released after 10 years with another identity.

Alex and his family members are still in police custody and waiting for their punishment.

description: Steak Sliders!Horseradish Mayo1/2 cup mayozest and juice of one lemon1/4 cup thinly sliced chives2 Tbsp fresh horseradish, gratedsalt and pepper to tasteFried Onions2 yellow onions, thinly sliced2 cups whole milk1 1/2 cups all purpose flour1/2 tsp salt1/2 tsp black pepper1 tsp garlic powder1 tsp paprika2 cups frying oilSteak2 Ribeye steakssalt and pepperhigh heat oil3 Tbsp unsalted butter2 sprigs rosemary2 sprigs thyme2 cloves garlic, crushedOther ingredientsSlider rollscheddar cheesefresh arugulaIn a bowl, mix mayo, lemon zest, lemon juice, chives, horseradish, salt and pepper. Mix well and place in fridge.Next, add all of your sliced onions to a bowl and cover with whole milk.In a bowl, mix together all purpose flour, salt, pepper, garlic powder and paprika. Take a handful of your onions and let the excess milk drip off. Then add it to your flour mixture and toss to coat evenly. Heat your frying oil to 350f and fry your onions in batches for 4-5 minutes or until crispy and golden brown. Then remove to paper towel lined plate and season with salt.Next, season your ribeyes generously with salt and pepper on both sides. Heat a cast iron skillet over medium high heat. Once ripping hot, add your oil and add your ribeyes. Press firmly into pan and let sear for 2-3 minutes. Then flip and move your steaks to one side of the pan. Then add your butter, thyme, rosemary and garlic. Once your butter is melted, baste your steaks until they reach 125f. Then remove to a wire lined sheet tray and let rest for at least 10 minutes.To assembleOn the bottom layer of your rolls, add a generous spoonful of horseradish mayo. Then your sliced ribeye and cheddar cheese. Melt the cheese using a broiler or kitchen torch. Then add your fried onions, arugula and more sauce. Add the top rolls, slice and enjoy!

description: Did you know that this country has no mosquitoes, no McDonald’s, and no standing army?Today is day 77 of our 195-day journey exploring 195 countries, and we are visiting this remote island in the North Atlantic, southeast of Greenland. This country spans 103,000 square kilometers, roughly the size of South Korea.Reykjavik, the world’s northernmost capital, is home to about 90% of the country’s 375,000 residents.The land features plateaus, mountains, ice fields, and a coastline marked by deep fjords carved by glaciers. Vatnajökull is the largest glacier in Europe. According to the Global Peace Index, this country is the safest in the world.Known as the land of fire and ice, home to the northern lights, this country has a thousand-year-old parliamentary body, making it one of the longest-standing democratic institutions in the world. description: after the Kori Gassi video I obvvsss had to do more of these. honestly i wasn’t gonna upload this as the second video but I couldn’t wait because of how this turned out haha (so stay tuned for the actual second one lolzzz)my mom is just naturally funny and the best part of most of days are talking to her about the most random things 🥰so this is her recipe and as usual everyone will have their own version which may taste great but this is my moms :D (refined by me to get actual proportions for you 😂)to make these mangaluruuuuu buns you need;- 3 large ripe bananas (riper the better)- 2 tablespoons of Greek yogurt (basically needs to have lower water content)- 3-4 tsps of sugar (adjust according to your preference and depending on how sweet your bananas are. It does become less sweet as it cooks but I found this ratio to work for me)- 1 tsp jeera (cumin) seeds- 1/2 tsp salt- 1/4 tsp baking soda- 2-3 tsp rava for some cruuunch (karkur) but this is optional- 4-5 cups of ap flour (maida) or wheat flour (atta) (I used half and half because I ran out of ap flour mid way lolz). basically keep adding till you have a sticky tacky dough- oil for greasing and fryingmix all the ingredients till combined. you should have a stickyish dough that’s not liquidly but holds its shape and is slightly wet and tacky when you touch it.once you feel the dough is right, grease your hands and the bowl with neutral oil and place the dough in and cover. let it rest for as long as possible (also depends on the environment temperature). i let mine rest over night because I live in an igloo.once rested, sprinkle flour on your rolling surface generously and roll out poori sized buns that are thick like half an inch or so. use flour as required to avoid sticking. dust off the excess and fry in hot oil. to get it to puff up you can softly poke the bun when it’s frying (you can see it in the video) and it should bubble. fry on both sides till perfectly brown and serve hotttt with yummy coconut chutney and your day is MADE!

description: It is well-known that when the Americans and British sent their navies into the Bay of Bengal (task force 74 and task force Eagle respectively) the Soviet navy confronted them.Under Admiral V Kruglyakov, the Soviet navy deliberately let its nuclear submarines surface, to be picked up by American satellites, to threaten the American surface fleet.The Soviets also organised a flotilla of cruisers and destroyers under task force 40 to help Admiral Kruglyakov's much smaller force.Faced with these twin threats, the US and British task forces withdrew from the Bay of Bengal and could not interfere with Indian land operations in erstwhile East Pakistan now Bangladesh.      army

description: menceritakan seorang wanita muda yang cerdas dan suka memberontak bernama Estella (Emma Stone). Estella tinggal di Kota London, Inggris pada era 1970-an. Estella terlahir dengan rambut separuh putih dan separuh hitam yang membedakannya dengan gadis-gadis kebanyakan di dunia.Estella sejak kecil bercita-cita menjadi seorang desainer ternama. Sayangnya, impian itu kandas akibat sebuah insiden memilukan yang ia alami pada masa lalunya. Saat usianya masih 12 tahun Estella harus kehilangan kedua orang tuanya juga kehilangan sebagian hartanya dan jatuh dalam kemiskinan. Sejak itu, Estella hidup sebagai pencuri bersama dua rekan kriminalnya Horace (Paul Walter Hauser) dan Jasper (Joel Fry).Suatu ketika, impian Estella menjadi desainer terwujud dengan menjadi karyawan di sebuah rumah mode ternama The Baroness, milik desainer bertangan dingin Nyonya Baroness (Emma Thompson). Berkat bakatnya di bidang fashion, Estella ditunjuk menjadi tangan kanan Nyonya Baroness juga dipercaya mendesain koleksi The Baroness.Namun Estella adalah sosok yang tidak suka menjadi pesuruh orang lain dan menginginkan panggung untuk dirinya sendiri. Ditambah insiden yang melibatkan Nyonya Baroness dan liontin bermata merah warisan mendiang ibunya. Estella akhirnya berubah menjadi sosok berhati dingin yang tidak kenal ampun. Diapun berganti nama menjadi Cruella de Vil.Judul film/tittle/movie : Cruella (2021)

As a result, he cursed the river that it would become invisible after a certain distance. The river now flows invisibly after some distance, but can still be seen roaring around Bheem Pul.The river is the liquid form of Mother Saraswati, the main deity of knowledge and speech. description: A commuter's car was vandalized by auto rickshaw drivers in Bengaluru in a case of road rage, which was captured on camera. Sharing the details on the automobile updates website Team-BHP, the man, who preferred to remain anonymous, recounted the incident that occurred at south Bengaluru's Ejipura signal during his afternoon drive for a work event.He stated that while driving at a speed of 70 to 80 kilometers per hour, he had not done anything except overtaking a few cars. At the signal, two auto rickshaws became agitated as he didn't allow them to pass and slot in behind another car. Despite his attempts to avoid confrontation, the drivers tried to intimidate him and eventually cornered him by stopping their vehicles in front of his car.The dash camera footage shared on the automotive platform captured the moment when the car window was smashed, leading to injuries for the victim. The incident gained attention after the video went viral, prompting Bengaluru Police to respond and request further details for investigation._Editor note:Dear viewers,In the video, there are two cars depicted. The first clip does not display the number plate of the targeted car; rather, it depicts how the car owner who was behind the auto was compelled to stop by obstructing his path. The second clip features the car that was actually attacked.

description: In a race car, the clutch operates as a mechanical device that engages and disengages the engine from the drivetrain, facilitating gear changes and controlling power transfer. It consists of a clutch plate, pressure plate, and flywheel; when the clutch pedal is pressed, the assembly disengages, allowing the driver to shift gears smoothly without stalling the engine, and when released, it re-engages to transmit engine power to the wheels.

description: O secretário-geral da Organização das Nações Unidas (ONU), António Guterres, disse que o aquecimento global (acabou), e que o mundo acaba de entrar na era da (‘ebulição global’). O discurso, realizado na última quinta-feira (27), serve para eliminar qualquer dúvida de que a humanidade precisa urgentemente cortar as emissões de gases do efeito estufa, combater o desmatamento e preservar o que resta da biodiversidade.Em entrevista coletiva, Guterres salientou a divulgação de dados oficiais da Organização Meteorológica Mundial e do Copernicus Climate Change Service da Comissão Europeia. Nesse sentido, segundo o secretário-geral da ONU, os números confirmam que julho de 2023 foi o mês mais quente já registrado na história da humanidade.“As consequências são claras e trágicas: crianças arrastadas pelas chuvas das monções; famílias fugindo das chamas; trabalhadores desmaiando no calor escaldante”, reforçou Gutteres.O mês de julho acumulou recordes de temperatura. Ondas de calor vêm atingindo o norte da África, a Europa, a Austrália e a América do Norte. Apesar da distância geográfica, porém, tais queimadas podem agravar a seca em países como o Brasil, já que substâncias são transportadas para o continente sul-americano pelo ar.

description: 2008 In Amroha, Uttar Pradesh (India) at 2 o'clock in the night the villagers heard a woman (Shabnam) screaming. Shabnam was pleading for help from the balcony of her house with a very pale face. When people saw in her house they saw that the dead bodies of 7 family members of Shabnam were lying there. Shabnam told them that she did not know anything about this incident because she was sleeping on the terrace that night and had come down because of the rain. Police investigation revealed that Shabnam, along with her boyfriend (Saleem), murdered her family members because Shabnam's parents were against their marriage. That night Shabnam had given intoxicating tea to her family members then Salim went to Shabnam's house with an axe. Shabnam held her family members head and Saleem beheaded them with axe . Shabnam also choked her 10y/o nephew .Shabnam was pregnant at that time and gave birth to a child (Taj) in jail due to which the execution of Shabnam and Salim was delayed for 7 years as per Indian rules. After the court's decision, Shabnam and Saleem will be sentenced to death in Mathura jail. Their son, Taj, is even today requesting the President and the Supreme Court for relief for his parents.Shabnam will be the first woman of independent India to be hanged.

Although the reporter realised his mistake, it was too late. Cutting off the reporter, the anchor took over to try save the day. “We will get back to that in a bit. We couldn’t hear you very well Ashmit,” she said.Following the incident, the official handle of the channel issued an apology. “Earlier today on a live broadcast, a reporter inadvertently used inappropriate language not realising he was on air. description: Kusum Kumari from Jalandhar, then a 15-year-old girl, fought with men who were trying to snatch her smartphone while she was coming back home from tuition around 2 pm on August 30, 2020. Her daily wager father had bought the phone so that she could attend online classes during the Covid-19 pandemic. A more than a minute-long CCTV video shows the young girl resisting the snatchers before some other people join her to overpower one of the snatchers.The video shows two bikers coming from behind and trying to snatch the mobile phone from the teenager. Kusum runs behind them fearlessly and manages to grab a snatcher and drag him off the bike. Kusum said she knew that it would have been difficult for her father to buy a new phone for her, so she tried her best to stop the snatchers.⬇️Full video uploaded on my story 💌

description: ವಿಶ್ವ ವಿಖ್ಯಾತ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು ಕರಗ - Karnataka famous Bengaluru Karaga 2024 🙏Creator : Date : Apr 24ಉತ್ಸವದ ಕುರಿತು ಹೇಳಬೇಕೆಂದರೆ 'ಕ ರ ಗ' ಎಂಬುದು 'ಕೈ'ಯಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿಡಿಯದೆ 'ರುಂ'ಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಧರಿಸಿ 'ಗ'ತಿಸುವುದು/ಚಲಿಸುವುದು ಎಂಬುದರ ಸಂಕ್ಷೀಪ್ತ ರೂಪವಾಗಿದೆ.ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ನಗರ್ತಪೇಟೆಯಲ್ಲಿರುವ ಶ್ರೀ ಧರ್ಮರಾಯ ಸ್ವಾಮಿ ದೇವಾಲಯವು ಕರಗ ಮೆರವಣಿಗೆಯ ಆರಂಭಿಕ ಸ್ಥಳವಾಗಿದೆ ಮತ್ತು ಕರಗ ಉತ್ಸವಕ್ಕೆ ಸಂಬಂಧಿಸಿದ ಮುಖ್ಯ ದೇವಾಲಯವಾಗಿದೆ. ನಗರ್ತಪೇಟೆ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು ವಿಮಾನ ನಿಲ್ದಾಣದಿಂದ 37 ಕಿ.ಮೀ ಮತ್ತು ನಗರ ಕೇಂದ್ರದಿಂದ(ಮೆಜೆಸ್ಟಿಕ್) 5 ಕಿ.ಮೀ ದೂರದಲ್ಲಿದೆ.ಇತಿಹಾಸ: ಮಹಾಭಾರತದ ಸಮಯದಲ್ಲಿ, ಪಂಚ ಪಾಂಡವರ ಪತ್ನಿ ದ್ರೌಪದಿ ಕಿರು ಸೈನ್ಯವನ್ನು ರಚಿಸಲು ಮತ್ತು ರಾಕ್ಷಸ ತಿಮಿರಾಸುರನನ್ನು ಸೋಲಿಸಲು ಹಲವಾರು ವೀರ ಕುಮಾರರನ್ನು (ಕೆಚ್ಚೆದೆಯ ಪುತ್ರರನ್ನು) ಸೃಷ್ಟಿಸಿದಳು. ಆಕೆಯ ಸಾವಿನ ಸಮಯದಲ್ಲಿ, ಈ ವೀರ ಕುಮಾರರು ದ್ರೌಪದಿಗೆ ಅವರನ್ನು ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಹೋಗದಂತೆ ಬೇಡಿಕೊಂಡರು. ದ್ರೌಪದಿ ಬದಲಿಗೆ ಪ್ರತಿ ವರ್ಷ ಚೈತ್ರ ಮಾಸ (ತಿಂಗಳು) ಹುಣ್ಣಿಮೆಯ ದಿನದಂದು ಹಿಂದಿರುಗುವ ಭರವಸೆ ನೀಡಿದಳು. ಆದಿಶಕ್ತಿ ರೂಪದಲ್ಲಿ ದ್ರೌಪದಿ ಮರಳಿದ್ದನ್ನು ಗುರುತಿಸಲು ಪ್ರತಿ ವರ್ಷ ಕರಗ ಹಬ್ಬವನ್ನು ಆಚರಿಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ.Shri Dharama Raya Swamy temple in Nagarathpete, Bengaluru is the starting point for the Karaga procession and main temple associated with the Karaga festival. Nagarathpete is 37 kms from Bengaluru airport and 5 kms from city centre (majestic).History: During Mahabharata, Draupadi, wife of five Pandavas created several Veera Kumaras (brave sons) to form a mini army and defeat demon Timirasura. At the time of her death, these Veera Kumaras begged Draupadi not to leave them. Draupadi instead promised to return each year during the full moon day of Chaitra masa (month). Karaga festival is celebrated each year to mark the return of Draupadi in the form of Adishakti.     Tourism

description: CALF RAISE MISTAKES!Mistake 1:❌ Allowing your knees to bend during the descentThis mistake hinders the effectiveness of the exercise by diverting attention away from the calves and involving unintended muscles, which can result in suboptimal gains.Instead ⬇️✅ Keep your legs mostly straightBy maintaining relatively straight legs, you can direct the focus onto the calf muscles, increasing engagement and maximizing gains in both strength and size.Error 2:❌ Neglecting the full range of motionFailing to utilize the complete range of motion limits the effectiveness of the exercise, leading to reduced engagement of the calf muscles and hindering potential muscle growth and strength development.Instead ⬇️✅ Ensure complete extension and contractionExecuting the exercise with a full range of motion ensures that the calf muscles are fully engaged throughout the movement, triggering maximum muscle activation and allowing for optimal muscle growth and strength enhancement.

description: In the year 2022, a couple named Bhagwal Singh and Laila Singh lived in Kerala, India. Both husband and wife were doctors and famous on social media, but despite this, financial problems were going on in their house. One day Bhagwal came across a message from a girl (Shridevi) on Facebook after a deep conversation, Bhagwal told her about his financial problem. Shreedevi sent one of her men (Shafi) to his house. Shafi told Bhagwal and Laila that the reason for their financial problems was black magic and they would have to perform human sacrifice.(kill a human and perform trick) Bhagwal and Laila agreed. After this, Shafi brought a woman to his house with the promise of giving her money in exchange for adult videos . But he cut her throat and killed her.After this he sprinkled drops of her blood around the house. Couple found no difference for a few days so Shafi again called a woman to his house and killed her too. All three together ate the dead body of her and buried the remaining pieces. After filing the police report of the kidnapped lady, police checked her call list and caught Shafi and the couple .Police found 10kg flash pieces of those 2 women inside the house.(The Shridevi was Shafi itself with fake id . The case is still going on in the court .)Its unbelievable how can a literate couple did such a foolish act.

description: The Assam state cabinet, in a session held on Friday, endorsed the Assam Repealing Ordinance, 2024, aimed at nullifying the British-era Marriage and Divorce Act specific to Muslims. Assam's Chief Minister, Himanta Biswa Sarma, issued a resolute statement on Monday, firmly pledging to combat child marriages in the state and abolish the Assam Muslim Marriages and Divorces Registration Act, 1935, "for as long as he is alive."In a fiery address to the state assembly, Sarma criticized the Opposition's stance, affirming his determination to eradicate child marriage by 2026. He directly addressed the assembly, stating, "Hear me carefully, as long as I am alive, I will not let child marriage take place in Assam." Amidst the walkout by Congress and the All India United Democratic Front (AIUDF) protesting the cabinet's decision, Sarma issued a bold challenge, proclaiming, "I will shut down this shop before 2026."Highlighting the significance of repealing the Act, Sarma stressed its importance in providing relief to Muslim women from "torture and exploitation" while working to curb the prevalence of child marriage. He emphasized the role of the Prime Minister's initiatives in setting precedents, citing the example of triple talaq, and underscored the necessity of repealing the Act to further restrict the registration of marriages involving girls under 18 years old.Addressing the media on Friday, Sarma reiterated the importance of repealing the Act, stating, "The torture and exploitation that has been going on against Muslim mothers for so long will be ended with this bill." He emphasized the impact of repealing the Act on the ease of granting talaq and the registration of marriages involving underage girls, affirming that these measures would be significantly curtailed following the repeal.

description: The Supreme Court of India asked Patanjali if the apology put out in the newspaper was the size of the misleading advertisement. Advocate Mukul Rohatgi, representing Patanjali, said the apology was published in 67 newspapers at a cost of ₹10 lakh.The judges hearing the case asked if the apology published was of the same size and font. Patanjali's lawyer responded that the company has spent lakhs of rupees. Justice Hima Kohli said the court is not bothered by the money spent, and it should be of the same size. The Supreme Court adjourned the matter for a week after Ramdev said he would publish a bigger apology in newspapers. Patanjali has published misleading ads claiming to cure diseases such as COVID, high blood pressure, and diabetes. Ramdev had earlier said that allopathy was a stupid and bankrupt science.24vsimanews

description: IIT Bombay failed to hire any faculty member from Scheduled Tribe (ST) or Other Backward Class (OBC) categories last year, despite the low representation of marginalized groups in academic positions at the institute, as revealed in response to a Right to Information (RTI) query. Out of the 21 teachers hired in 2023, only four belonged to reserved categories, all from Scheduled Castes (SC), according to information obtained through an RTI request by the student group Ambedkar Periyar Phule Study Circle (APPSC). This recruitment pattern aligns with the existing caste composition of the institute's faculty, where only 6% of teachers, or 44 out of 718, come from backward communities. Students argue that this constitutes a violation of the reservation policy for central universities, which mandates a 15% quota for SCs, 7.5% for STs, and 27% for OBCs.

description: On April 21, 2024, at Palampur bus stand, a 21-year-old student was attacked, suffering serious injuries to her hand, arm, and head. She was taken to Civil Hospital, Palampur, then to Tanda Hospital, and finally to PGI, Chandigarh, where her condition has improved.The police arrested the attacker, a multi-task worker in the PWD department, he had gone to his relative's wedding in village Salan 6 years ago, where he had seen the victim at the wedding and since then both of them started talking through calls. After about 3 years, he came to know that the victim was with another boy. For the last 15-20 days, his number was blocked and on April 20, when he asked the victim to talk, she refused, then he lost his temper and attacked her 8-10 times with a sharp weap*n. The police are investigating further after obtaining remand from the court.Rumors related to the case are spreading on social media, and the police's cyber cell is monitoring and will take action against those spreading misinformation.

description: In Maharashtra, near chahardi village, there is a disturbing incident involving a 12-year-old child named Mangesh Patil. One day, after school, Mangesh went missing, causing great concern among his family and the villagers. The police were informed, and an extensive search commenced. A few days later, the police found a severed leg belonging to Mangesh in the nearby forests.As the investigation progressed, suspicions turned towards a relative named Sadam Patil, who was Mangesh mother's nephew. It was discovered that Sadam had been having an illicit relationship with Mangesh's mother, Geetabai, whenever Mangesh and his sister were at school and their father, Dagru Patil, was at work. The affair was taking place while Geetabai pretended to be a grieving mother.Further revelations came to light as Sadam confessed that his friend, Rajendra Patil, was also involved in the illicit affair. Together, the three had been engaging in immoral acts while Mangesh was away. On the day of Mangesh's disappearance, Geetabai and Rajendra were caught in a compromising situation by Mangesh, leading to his tragic death at their hands.To dispose of Mangesh's b*dy, the perpetrators decided to cut it into pieces during the cover of night. However, their heinous act was eventually uncovered by the police and shocked the entire village. The mother's false sorrow had deceived everyone, and the extent of her cruelty and disregard for her own child left the community in disbelief.The police, determined to bring justice to Mangesh, formed a team of 50 officers to intensify their investigation.

description: Nestlé’s products for babies in Asia, Africa and Latin America were found to contain added sugars, while the same products sold in Europe did not have it, according to a recent report.This included the world’s biggest baby cereal brand Cerelac, which reportedly contained added sugars that averaged nearly 3 grams per serving when sold in Indian markets. Sugar is generally not recommended for infants, although guidelines in several developing countries do not explicitly prohibit it.Public Eye, a Swiss organisation that undertakes investigations, public advocacy and campaigns, published the report in collaboration with the International Baby Food Action Network (IBFAN). It was based on tests on Nestlé products that were conducted in a Belgian lab.

description: George Pickering's story gained attention for his courageous act during a tense situation involving his son. In 2015, George Pickering III was declared brain dead after suffering a stroke, but his father, George Pickering Jr., disagreed with the diagnosis and refused to accept the decision to take his son off life support. In a desperate attempt to save his son, George Jr. barricaded himself in his son's hospital room with a handgun for several hours, which resulted in a standoff with police. During this time, he engaged in negotiations with authorities, and eventually, his son showed signs of improvement. This bold act ultimately led to a peaceful resolution, as George Jr. surrendered to the police, and his son was given more time for treatment, ultimately recovering. description: A timeline of a society is often marked with events that shake its conscience and do not let it forget for many years to come. A killing spree in the early 2000s by Raja Kolander is one such case. The man would not only kill people but dismember the corpse and reportedly in some cases, boil their skulls and eat their brain. A journalist with a Hindi daily, Dhirendra Singh went missing on December 14, 2000. He had left his office for home but never reached home, as per an Amar Ujala report. When he did not return even after two days, police started a search. Going through Dhirendra's call records, the police zeroed in on a phone number that belonged to the son of a Parliamentarian, the report added.The police reached the MP’s son and found the location from where the call was made. Swinging into action, the then Station House Officer of Prayagraj’s Kydganj police station, SN Tripathi, raided a pig farm in Naini and found Raja Kolander. According to a Navbharat Times report, Kolander called Dhirendra to his farmhouse on a cold winter night in December. Wearing an overcoat, the journalist arrived at the venue where a feast was awaiting him. The two men indulged in some conversation at the lavish farmhouse. Kolander asked Dhirendra to go near the fireplace as the weather was cold. During the course of interrogation, Kolander revealed that he had lent Rs 50,000 to one Kali Prasad Srivastava, also an employee at the ordnance factory. While Kolander was awaiting his repayment, Srivastava would offer him advice on how to dodge the police after committing a crime, which left an impression on Kolander, as per the Amar Ujala report. Kolander separated the skull from the body, boiled it, and drank the soup hoping to get a smart brain like that of his smart lender. Initially, Kolander and Vaksharaj were sent to Naini jail but were shifted to Lucknow jail later. Currently, both of them are serving their sentence in an Unnao jail in Uttar Pradesh.

description: Meme History & Origin:-The “ye gendu generation hai” meme originated from a speech delivered by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on the occasion of India’s 75th Independence Day on August 15, 2021. In his speech, Modi praised the current generation, referring to them as the “can-do” generation, highlighting their immense potential and capabilities. However, due to a mishearing or misinterpretation, the phrase “can-do” was mistakenly heard as “gendu,” which translates to “stupid” in Hindi. As a result, the meme template emerged, depicting Modi stating, “ye gendu generation hai,” implying that this is a generation of foolish individuals. The meme is commonly used to convey the idea that the current generation lacks wisdom or intelligence, while the person sharing the meme considers themselves to be more knowledgeable or experienced.This meme is from the a speech given by modiji on 15August, 2021. description: Dal Dhokli from Gujarat, India 🇮🇳❤️Dal Dhokli is a traditional Gujarati dish that combines lentils (dal) with freshly made wheat flour dhokli which is similar to freshly rolled out pasta. It’s a hearty meal where bite-sized pieces of spiced wheat flour dough sheets are simmered in a tangy & slightly sweet lentil soup flavored with various spices. It’s often garnished with cilantro, onions, tomatoes, lemon juice and served hot, making it a comforting and wholesome dish. It’s easy to think of this as the Indian version of pasta, but it’s actually a traditional Gujarati preparation that is fully packed with flavor and just happens to be vegan...

description: Did you know? ?The word “sari” means “strip of cloth” in Sanskrit.The journey of saris began alongside the Indus valley civilization around 2800 BC .The earliest depictions show women draped in a garment resembling the modern saree.The beauty of the sari as a garment lies partly in its versatility as a completely unstitched garment. While the length of the fabric itself can vary, the average sari measures up to about 5.5 meters or six yards.Now, in modern times, saris are worn regularly throughout South Asia, in India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and beyond.Did you know about the history of sari?Let us know in the comments below

description: Now, class, let’s have a political discussion in strict parliamentary behaviour. What did you expect? A civil and respectful code of conduct? Give it another thought.The Hindu’s 2012 ad was not just a wake-up call, it was a powerful anthem for change. description: The dawg method ⏬️This will work better than any study hack you’ve ever tried. So, to all my dawgs. Grab a stimulus to condition yourself with. A stimulus is simply anything used to illicit a reaction.The more stimuli, the merrier. Personally, I use all four of the following stimuli simultaneously which gives me way more triggers to continue studying, and makes it automatic to study when I’m unmotivated. If you do all 4 of these, you’ll be unstoppable.Stimuli Examples:🟣 Lighting a candle🟣 Turning on a lamp🟣 Starting a timer🟣 Listening to a specific study playlistOvertime your brain will associate seeing, smelling, or hearing the stimuli with being in a focused flow state. So even if you’re not in the mood to study, you can turn on the stimulus and your brain will enter GO mode.You can put this method on steroids by giving yourself a reward after. (Highly recommend if you have adhd)Steps:1️⃣ Choose a stimulus2️⃣ Turn on the stimulus3️⃣ Start studying for 20 mins4️⃣ When you get distracted, turn off the stimulus5️⃣ Once you’re done, have a reward6️⃣ Take a 10 min break7️⃣ RepeatPro tip: 40 Hz Binaural Beats has been shown to improve retention & learning speeds. If you’d like to try out my study playlists comment “dog” and I’ll send it over.If you’re interested in 1:1 coaching comment “dog” and I’ll send you a text. I’ll be able to help you improve your focus, overcome procrastination, study more effectively, reduce test anxiety, while crushing all of your personal goals :)Let’s get it 🧠🔓             method

description: THE ONLY CASE RECORDED AS PARANORMAL IN SPANISH POLICE FILES: THE VALLECAS CASEThe Vallecas Case is Spain’s most famous incident involving paranormal activities that occurred in an apartment in Madrid.The focal point of the incident is a young girl named Estefania Gutierrez Lazaro, who had an interest in supernatural events.Estefania and two friends attempted to communicate with unseen entities using a Ouija board at school.Despite a teacher’s intervention breaking the board, Estefania’s friends reported seeing smoke emanate from it, which Estefania then inhaled.Following this event, changes were observed in Estefania’s behavior and health; she experienced insomnia, hallucinations, and epileptic seizures.Estefania claimed that faceless, cloaked figures visited her at night, wanting to take her away.Doctors could not find a medical explanation for Estefania’s experiences.Estefania’s condition worsened, and on July 13, 1991, she attacked her sister, had a catatonic seizure, and fell into a coma.She died in the hospital the next day; the autopsy report recorded her death as ‘sudden and suspicious’.After Estefania’s death, paranormal activities increased in her family’s home; they experienced screams, laughter, and self-opening doors.Mrs. Gutierrez felt physical contact in the house and witnessed Estefania’s photograph burning one night; the rest of the house remained undamaged.The family called the police on November 27; Inspector Jose Negri and his team arrived at the house and encountered paranormal events.The police report detailed a wardrobe door opening violently, noises from the balcony, brown sludge, and a cross found on the floor.Next to the removed cross, three claw marks were found on the wall.The police stated they could not intervene in paranormal incidents and the family left the house.Mrs. Gutierrez sought psychological treatment following the events.The Vallecas Case is the first ‘paranormal’ incident recorded in Spanish police files.Estefania’s death and the subsequent events attracted significant interest in Spain and worldwide, igniting debates on paranormal activities.

unseen entities using a ouija board at schooldespite a teachers intervention breaking the board estefanias friends reported seeing smoke emanate from it which estefania then inhaledfollowing this event changes were observed in estefanias behavior and health she experienced insomnia hallucinations and epileptic seizuresestefania claimed that faceless cloaked figures visited her at night wanting to take her awaydoctors could not find a medical explanation for estefanias experiencesestefanias condition worsened and on july 13 1991 she attacked her sister had a catatonic seizure and fell into a description: Often we experience an internal conflict between what our heart desires and what our mind thinks. This conflict becomes particularly pronounced when it comes to fulfilling our desires.When the brain and heart work differently, there is some tension. The brain can analyze the situation rationally, taking into account various factors and consequences, while the heart may draw us towards something that seems emotionally appealing to us.This often leads to disagreements and struggles between our rational decisions and emotional impulses. But sometimes, when we neglect one of these aspects, we may find that we do not experience complete satisfaction from fulfilling our desires.It is important to learn to listen to and understand both the brain and the heart, and strive for a balance between them. This will allow us to make more conscious and satisfying decisions when it comes to fulfilling our desires.Still, the most effective way is through meditation practice, which can help calm the mind, gather thoughts, and make a decision that suits you best.

description: Why did Bhimrao Ambedkar regret drafting the constitution - J Sai Deepak...https://youtu.be/7x-W_lIH5-4?si=UGkmc7c9FrcGbXBJ...Bhimrao Ramji Ambedkar, architect of a futuristic India, was a jurist, social reformer, and the founding father of the Indian Constitution. He was born on April 14, 1891, in Mhow, Madhya Pradesh. Throughout his early life, he faced profound discrimination as a member of the oppressed caste. Despite social and economic discrimination, Ambedkar has a legacy of rising from the margins of society to the forefront of the Indian freedom struggle.He pursued education relentlessly, earning degrees from prestigious institutions like the University of Bombay and the London School of Economics. His academic achievements laid the foundation for his future role as a social reformer and legal luminary. Baba Sahab exemplifies his in-depth understanding of social justice and equality by drafting a trailblazing Constitution. As the chairman of the Drafting Committee, he played a crucial part in shaping the fundamental principles that govern the world’s largest democracy. Moreover, his commitment to justice, equality, and individual rights is evident in the constitutional provisions that seek to eliminate discrimination and promote social harmony.tva  speech

description: Did you know this?> There is a mini Tibet, hosting the world’s second-largest Tibetan settlement (Dharamsala in Himachal Pradesh has the largest Tibetian settlement) in Karnataka.> In the 1960s, when China invaded Tibet, nearly 1 lakh Tibetans were tragically killed within two and a half years.> Around 98% of the monasteries were destroyed, erasing the local culture.> In response, many Tibetan refugees sought shelter in India, including their leader Dalai Lama.> He requested the Indian government to provide a place for Tibetan refugees in India.> The then Karnataka Chief Minister, S Nijalingappa, allocated 3,000 acres of land in Mysuru district’s Bylakuppe town.> Today, more than 20,000 Tibetans live there happily, preserving their culture.> There is hope that one day, Tibetans will return to their homeland, as expressed by a settler in Bylakuppe, Mr. Dorji: “If we become Indian citizens, it will impact the Tibetan freedom struggle. There is still hope for the struggle among a majority of the Tibetan people.”…Resources:> https://karnatakatourism.org/tour-item/dzogchen-monastery-hidden-gem-of-karnataka/> https://karnatakatourism.org/things-to-do-in-bylakuppe/page/2/> The Hindu: Bylakuppe, a Tibetan settlement is an abode for the believer and the explorer: 24 May 2018> The Times of India: Dhondenling: A well-kept secret of Karnataka waiting to be explored: 05 Jan 2024> The New Indian Express: It’s Buddhist way: Tibetans in Karnataka keep virus at bay: 18 Apr 2021

description: A 4 year old girl named Kaya and her mother went to McDonald’s one day for lunch, after they finished their food Kaya asked her mother if she could use the bathroom by herself. Kaya had used the restroom by herself at home before, so her mom saw no reason why the McDonald’s bathroom would be any different. Kaya’s mom Nicole stood outside of the bathroom for a few minutes until she saw two teenage girls walking out laughing hysterically. At that moment that Nicole heard a scream come out of the bathroom and four year old Kaya came out crying. Nicole was confused why she was upset until she looked down at Kaya’s legs. She was bleeding all over the back of her legs and when they went to the bathroom they saw Kaya’s skin all over the toilet seat because the two teenage girls had spread super glue all over the bathroom seat. Luckily the manager called the police and got the two girls arrested.

description: 10-month-old Erik Cruz has a condition called cortical dysplasia, a rare brain disorder which causes him to experience roughly 30 epileptic seizures each day. The only medical solution is a special type of brain surgery, which costs 60,000 euros ($83,000).Ronaldo, the world’s top player, saw the request for a signed jersey and a signed pair of old cleats to sell to help raise funds for little Erik’s surgery, and he learned about the child’s story.He not only sent little Erik the signed jersey and signed cleats, but he also offered and then paid for the entire $83,000 medical procedure bill, and told Erik’s parents that he will cover the costs of any follow-up treatments needed.To everyone’s heartfelt joy, the surgery was a success, and little Erik has made a remarkable recovery. As the 10-month-old does have a scar on his head from the surgery, Ronaldo shaved a zig-zag on part of his head during a major game to pay tribute to little Erik. you are a legend 👏Congratulations on making it this far! Wishing you an amazing day ahead. If you're intrigued, why not check out our page  We share similar inspiring videos regularly! ❤️    fans

description: 🛑STOP USING THE WORD ‘OCD’ SO CASUALLY🛑Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder (OCD) isn’t just about being super neat.It’s like having a brain stuck on worry mode. Everyday tasks become stress zones, and to ease the anxiety, people do rituals or routines.It’s like your brain stuck on repeat with worries about doing things “just right.” Imagine feeling you have to touch a doorknob a specific number of times or count your steps in precise sequences. Picture the distress of fearing harm will come to loved ones if you don’t perform certain actions. OCD can turn ordinary routines into anxiety-filled challenges.It’s about these nagging thoughts insisting on specific actions, times, or ways, creating a constant struggle within the mind. Imagine your thoughts are storm clouds, and the rituals are attempts to clear the skies.So, next time you hear about OCD, think beyond the tidy surface – it’s a struggle to find calm in a chaotic mind.     awareness

description: On February 5, 1996, Mumbai Police conducted a raid at Kamathipura, Mumbai, and rescued 456 survivors of sex trafficking. Out of these 456, there were 128 Nepalese, and 50% were under 18 years of age.But when Mumbai Police contacted the Nepalese government, they refused to help them bring them back to their country because they had no birth certificates. Neither they can be in India nor reach Nepal.At that point, Bollywood actor Suniel Shetty took matters into his own hands. He booked tickets for all 128 Nepalese girls, made arrangements for their departure from India, and ensured that they reached home safely.He kept silent about his heroic deed for 24 years. This was recently revealed by Charimaya Tamang, one of the survivors of that raid.If you're still reading, I wish you a fantastic day!❤️If you have read this far, please consider following this page:  We share similar stories every day 🤍

description: Carve your Body with Pushups ⚠️.Pushups is a foundational movement you want to Master.Here are the 4 Form Tips you can use now to Master your Pushups. 🔥Form Tip : Instead of having your Fingers Stuck Together, make sure to spread your Fingers Apart, so you have greater stability at the wrist and avoid any Wrist Pain. ⚠️Form Tip : Instead of having your Hips Collapsed and NOT engaged, make sure you squeeze your Glutes together, so you’re stabilized at the Hips. ✅Form Tip : Instead of Having your Feet Apart, oftentimes I’ve seen plenty of people with uneven stance, so make sure to have your Feet in Together so it’s more even, this will make the exercise slightly more challenging, but a better formed Pushup. ✅Form Tip : Instead of Having your Elbows Flared Out and your Upper Traps Over-engaged, relax your traps and Tuck your Elbows in Slightly so you can train pain free. ✅Save this for next time you do Pushups. 🔥Keep crushing it saiyans. 💪🏽.  workout

description: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝟭% 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗹𝗲Since 2020,one very important question helped me to improve on a regular basis. "What one thing can I do today to improve myself by 1%?" Superficially this might seem pointless cause "change" itself is a contiguous process, but this question helped me to identify a specific action that moves me closer to what I want to see myself as in my current self.And even when I'm writing this, my process of constantly changing, adopting & rethinking myself hasn't stopped. As I said it's a continuous process, I'll keep doing it till my last breath.In mathematics how it works?(1)³⁶⁵ = 1 so 365 days if a year you're staying the same without adding any input to improve yourself, hike your sustainability, extend your mentality, your output will be the same. And you'll always find yourself stuck in the vicious cycle of self loathing, self doubting, anxiety etc.Now, (1.01)³⁶⁵ = 37.78 so 365 days you're just adding barely 0.01 to your current input & see how big the change is in long term. The difference in value is just 1%… it’s tiny!Why are the differences so significant…?The answer is in the number 365, which represents every day of the year. It might be small in respect of daily life, but when accumulated 365 times it's a big difference.Consistency. Yes, that matters. Constantly pushing your barriers. Little steps, done consistently time & time again, compound into big, big differences.Is it another naive motivation? Not truly. Now I know you may be thinking… “I’m not interested in maths”. Well that’s understandable… but I believe maths is the foundation of human existence. Cause this universe itself is a symphony of numbers & string theory.So without questioning the process try to apply it. I got the result. Yes, it might not be too overwhelming if compare with others, but when it comes to my past self vs me rn, it's impeccable. description: You guys can share your story if you wish too!!!Yeah?!!! And i know that i am never ever going to recover from that incident. Its not like that ki i never tried to come out of that situation but i always failed. I tried to trust people i tried to be happy i tried to go with the flow but in the end of the day its me and my thinking which doesn't want to believe anyone ,be happy or to go with the flow . I don't want sympathy i just wanted to share . I guess almost every teenager went from something. In my case its not about a relationship from which i am recovering its from someone who once was very close to my heart and later did something which i am not able to get out of it . 2 years ago i was suffering not knowing what was going but when i got to know the truth my whole world collapsed like what i did and why i am even suffering . After knowing the reality i shut off all my emotions all my feelings everything. When i entered new place i thought maybe here i will get out of it but no it is becoming worse . I don't even cry, i want to cry but I can't i want to scream the hell out of me but I can't. I also don't know why i am still like that before whyyyy !!! No matter what happens i need to be strong i need to be grow stronger i need to be the best in front of everyone. Yeah i do need someone beside me who can bring all the emotions and feelings from me to the world but i know there is no one .its just i am sharing a little part of my story not wanting people to give me sympathy i am already strong enough to tackle all the problem alone. If i don't cry or don't let out my emotions you can get to know that you can't make me cry nor i am a rotdu girl who can easily cry..Yeah i want to give chance to you but you need to know whole story!! I need to tell you everything!! Yeah please text me i feel really good whether you send reel or small message. I know that if you read this you will get to know who i am referring to if no then what can i even do if you understood then its a yes to your date . Just wanting to feel something which I don't feel anymore now 🫠and yes im tired of all the shit I don't want now i am sure of it i do want to give a chance!!!!

description: Imagine you’re watching a juggler. They’re tossing balls in the air with such grace, but here’s the kicker: they don’t care if they catch them or not. They’re not aiming for a perfect catch; they’re just enjoying the act of juggling itself. That’s similar to people who have let go of attachment to the results of their actions. They’re content regardless of the outcome because they’re focused on the process, not the end result. So, they’re always satisfied and not reliant on external validation. Despite being busy with activities, they’re actually doing nothing in the sense that they’re not tied to the consequences of their actions. It’s like living life as a beautiful dance, where the steps matter more than the applause.त्यक्त्वा कर्मफलासङ्गं नित्यतृप्तो निराश्रय: |कर्मण्यभिप्रवृत्तोऽपि नैव किञ्चित्करोति स: || 20||Such people, having given up attachment to the fruits of their actions, are always satisfied and not dependent on external things. Despite engaging in activities, they do not do anything at all.अपने कर्मों के फलों की आसक्ति को त्याग कर ऐसे ज्ञानीजन सदा संतुष्ट रहते हैं और बाह्य आश्रयों पर निर्भर नहीं होते। कर्मों में संलग्न रहने पर भी वे वास्तव में कोई कर्म नहीं करते।{ Bhagwat Gita, Bhagavad Gita, spiritual knowledge, spirituality, hindu, gita ka gyan, gita quotes, gita knowledge}

description: Brilliant Breakfast Service By Vistara!! ✈️ 🍽️🍲Embark on a delightful journey with me as I share my experience on a recent Vistara flight from Delhi to Chennai in economy class!Despite running late, thanks to Digi Yatra, I made it just in time, even managing to skip the long queue and check in my bag.From navigating through the bustling shopping mall to spotting planes along the way, the journey was filled with excitement. Once on board, I ensured a quick washroom check, finding it clean as usual.After takeoff, I eagerly awaited breakfast service, even putting in a request for an extra veg meal. The masala omelette hit just the right spot, followed by my own creation of an egg burger with Vistara’s bun and butter, elevated by a herby tomato sauce.Manisha’s warm service brought me my second breakfast of soft paratha and chole, paired perfectly with butter and followed by a comforting cup of tea.As I glimpsed the beauty of Marina Beach, I couldn’t help but anticipate the upcoming CSK vs LSG match. Don’t miss out, follow now!Thanks MS for the super quick edit

description: 🐾 Friendly Reminder: When it comes to feeding our beloved pets, let’s prioritize their health and safety! Avoid giving chicken necks and claws to your cats and dogs as they can potentially cause stomach issues or even pose a choking hazard. If you’re feeding stray cats, consider mixing meat with bones or preparing minced meat with a balanced variety. Remember, boneless isn’t the only option! Gizzard, crop, lungs, heart, and kidneys are all great alternatives packed with nutrients. Let’s spread awareness and keep our furry friends happy and healthy! 🐶🐱

description: Zero electricity bill, say what?I was speaking to my brother and he told me that he hasn’t been paying electricity bill at all from the last 2 years because of installing solar panels. Solar Panels are becoming increasingly popular in India but one of the problems faced is the installation cost of the same.To solve just this, the government has launched the Har Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana which is a welcome move!How to apply for PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana?-Visit the official website of PM Suryaghar: pmsuryaghar.gov.in-Click on Apply for Rooftop Solar.- In the next step, people need to register themselves by entering details like State, District, Consumer Account Number, and Electricity Distribution Company.-Then select the option to apply for the Rooftop Solar as per the form.-Now, applicants have to wait for the feasibility approval from DISCOM. Only those who have received approval from DISCOM can install the plant by any of the registered vendors in your DISCOM.-Once installation is over, submit the plant details and apply for a net meter.-After the installation of the net meter and inspection by DISCOM, people will generate a commissioning certificate from the portal.-After receiving the commissioning report, people have to submit the bank account details and a cancelled cheque through the portal to receive a subsidy within 30 days.“In order to further sustainable development and people’s wellbeing, we are launching the PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana. This project, with an investment of over Rs. 75,000 crores, aims to light up 1 crore households by providing up to 300 units of free electricity every month.” - Narendra ModiSource: Livemint, Official Portal of Muft Bijli Yojana

description: Jalaun: In a shocking incident, the wife and her newborn girl of Uttar Pradesh police constable died after the man could not reach home for their treatment on time. The constable, Vikas Nirmal. who is posted at Rampura police station in Jalaun district, was allegedly not given leave by his station in-charge to take his pregnant wife to the hospital.Sensing the delay, the woman's family members then intervened and took her to the Community Health Centre of Karawali in the Mainpuri district of the state. After a few hours, the couple was blessed with a baby girl. However, the condition of the mother- daughter deteriorated a day later, which was informed to the constable. After receiving the information, he requested Station Incharge Arjun Singh for leave, which was turned down by the latter. The constable then approached Jalaun SP Iraj Raja, after which he was granted a month's leave. Unfortunately, by the time he reached home, the mother-daughter duo was declared dead.

description: 🇬🇧 One day Trudy Coughlan goes to a copy shop to print 780 pages on a USB. The photocopier notices the Ferrari logo at the bottom of the pages and sends an e-mail to Stefano Domenicali from Ferrari.Domenicali examines the e-mail and immediately informs the police. Because the photocopier's e-mail contained all the information about the Ferrari car. After this incident, the police called the whole Ferrari team. At Nigel Stepney's house, documents sent to Mike Coughlan of McLaren were found.The FIA immediately opens a case. The main culprits are Nigel Stepney, Mike Coughlan and McLaren boss Ron Dennis. The long trial ends with a conversation between Fernando Alonso and Pedro De La Rosa. In these conversations, Mike Coughlan gave information about Ferrari.As a result of the case, McLaren's team points were deleted and a record fine of $100 million was imposed, Nigel Stepney was arrested and Mike Coughlan was fined. In 2014, Nigel Stepney committed suic*de by j*mping in front of a car.What do you think? Çünkü fotokopicinin attığı mail'de  Ferrari aracına ait tüm bilgiler vardı.Bu olayın üstüne polis, bütün Ferrari ekibini arar. description: 27 August 2021, Rohtak, Haryana. One day a boy named Abhishek Malik returned home after partying with his friends and finds the dead bodies of his father, Pradeep Malik, ( a rich property dealer), mother (Babli Devi), maternal grandmother (Roshni Devi) and his younger sister(Neha) was lying dead in his house. He told this to the neighbors and then the police are called. Abhishek was very sad and depressed due to the death of his family members. After a few days, in a police interogation Abishek was unable to answer some questions and the police realize that Abhishek is the real culprit. After strict interrogation, Abhishek admits that he had committed this crime. Actually, Abhishek was a gay boy who had fallen in love with one of his male friends, Kartik Latwal. Abhishek's sister came to know about this and she told this to her father, after which her father scolded him a lot but Abhishek still met his friend secretly. One day Abhishek asked his father for some money and said that he wanted to get his gender change surgery done. This made his father very angry and after this Abhishek's entire family started treating him very rudely. Angered by this, one day Abhishek shot and killed his sister, mother,father and his maternal grandmother with his father's revolver. Abishek got arrested on 2 sept 2021.

description: The voting for the 2024 Lok Sabha Election is scheduled to commence on 19th April and the result will be announced on 4th June. Ahead of the polls, the Bharatiya Janta Party presented its manifesto ‘Sankalp Patra’ titled “Modi’s Guarantee 2024” on 14th April in the presence of Prime Minister Narendra Modi who listed new goals for his government’s third term during the event. The party has prioritised “One Nation One Election,” “Population Control” and “Uniform Citizenship Code” and women’s empowerment and the upliftment of youth as well as the poor have received particular emphasis.One Nation One Election: One Nation, One Election is a proposal under consideration by the Government of India to synchronise elections for the Lok Sabha (the lower house of the Indian Parliament) and all state assemblies. It intends to hold these elections simultaneously, either on a single day or within a specific time frame.Social Security: According to ILO, Social security is the protection that a society provides to individuals and households to ensure access to health care and to guarantee income security, particularly in cases of old age, unemployment, sickness, invalidity, work injury, maternity or loss of a breadwinner.Piped Gas Line: What is a reticulated or piped gas system? It's a centralized piped gas system (or 'gas on tap'), which is a way to deliver cooking gas through a network of pipelines that are connected to the main gas cylinder storage system.Ayushman Health Scheme: With the aim of providing accessible healthcare to the economically disadvantaged, the Ayushman Bharat Yojana Scheme, including the AB-PMJAY and Ayushman card, offers comprehensive coverage of up to Rs. 5 lakh per family annually for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation care.Access Controlled Highways: A controlled-access highway is a type of highway that has been designed for high-speed vehicular traffic, with all traffic flow—ingress and egress—regulated.BJP Manifesto Download Link: https://www.bjp.org/files/inline-documents/Modi-Ki-Guarantee-Sankalp-Patra-English_0.pdf   manifesto

Striking a balance that supports a sustainable and healthy rate of weight loss is key.Spot Reducing Fat Myth:Spot reduction refers to the idea that you can selectively lose fat from a specific area of your body by targeting exercises for that region. Unfortunately, this concept is a myth. When you lose weight, your body decides where it burns fat based on genetic and hormonal factors, not the specific muscles you’re working.Fat is stored and burned systemically, meaning from all over the body, rather than in a targeted manner. Doing endless crunches, for example, won’t solely reduce fat around the abdominal area. Instead, a comprehensive approach involving both calorie deficit and overall fat loss through a combination of cardiovascular exercise, strength training, and a balanced diet is more effective.In summary, achieving a calorie deficit is a fundamental aspect of weight loss, but it’s essential to approach it in a balanced and sustainable way. description: Easement DisputeCase:- MANISHA MAHENDRA GALA vs. SHALINI BHAGWAN AVATRAMANIThe court explained two words i.e. ‘Dominant Heritage’ and ‘Servient Heritage’.Dominant Heritage is the land that is to be enjoyed by the beneficiary, whereas the land on which the easement is claimed is called Servient Heritage.Section 13 of the Indian Easements Act, 1882 states about easementary rights by necessity.“The easementary right by necessity could be acquired only in accordance with Section 13 of the Indian Easement Act which provides that such easementary right would arise if it is necessary for enjoying the Dominant Heritage. In the instant case, findings have been returned not only by the appellate courts but even by the trial court that there is an alternative way to access the Dominant Heritage, which may be a little far away or longer which demolishes the easement of necessity...Thus, the Gala’s (claimant) are not entitled to any easementary right by necessity upon the disputed rasta.”, the Bench Comprising Justices Pankaj Mithal and Prashant Kumar Mishra said..........

description: “It’s always seems Impossible until it’s done”. 💪✨Here’s a very Doable 10-hour Study plan curated just for you 📚⏰7:00am: Wake up. ☀️7 to 8am: Morning routine + Drink/breakfast ☕🍳8am to 10am: STUDY SESSION 1 (Maths/GS)(25 mins effective study/5 min break - repeat) 📖⏳10am to 11am - Break (Bath/Eat) 🚿🍽11am to 1 pm: STUDY SESSION 2 (GS)(25 mins effective study/5 min break – repeat) 📚🧠1pm – 3pm – Lunch/Nap/Screentime 🥗😴📱3pm to 5pm – STUDY SESSION 3 (GS/ENGLISH)(25 mins effective study/5 min break – repeat) 📝📚5pm to 7pm – Outdoor activity/walk/run/talking to friends/family time/house chores 🌳🚶‍♀️👨‍👩‍👧‍👦7pm to 9pm - STUDY SESSION 4 (GS/MATHS) 📖🧮9pm to 10pm – Dinner, screentime 🍽📺10pm to 12pm – STUDY SESSION 5 (Pomodoro technique) 📚⏳12 – Sleep Tight (No time waste on Mobile) 😴🌙The problem is we tend to over expect from ourselves. Over expectation will lead you nowhere. First increase your study hours to 2, then 4, then 6 and then 8!!! 💡✅ -Keep your mobiles aside while studying on silent mode/switched off.- Calculate your effective study time – E.g. -25 mins of study, 5min break ✍️⏱✅ Have weekly targets - Finish up what you could not do in the weekend 🎯✅ Reward yourself on weekends on completion of successful time table follow – Go out 🎉🥳✅ Take help from family and friends to help you stick to it (Only Positive people please) 👫❤️✅ If you are sitting for Studies, but don’t feel like – Practice MCQ, just do something relevant to studies! 📝💡Obviously if you are working or in college – this might not be possible! description: My daughter Siya will have 1 Cr rs at the age of 18.In India education inflation is around 12%, which means school and college fees are doubling every 6 years.That’s why it has become a necessity to Save & Invest money for a child's future .So, I opened a 3-in-1 child account in Siya's name, which has facilities for a bank account, demat account and trading account.Then we decided that my husband and I will separately save 6500 rupees every month for Siya. (Neha-6500 + Deepak-6500 = Total 13000)And we will invest this amount in India's index NIFTY50 through Nifty ETF.Some popular NIFTY 50 ETFs -1. NIFTY BeES2. Nifty 50 ETF3. NIFTY ETFSo by investing 1.56 lakhs every year, we will invest a total of 28 lakhs in 18 years.And if we take the historical average returns of 12% for NIFTY50, then Siya will have 1 crore rupees at the age of 18.Also, we will keep increasing the investment amount every year by 10 % ,and by that SIYA will get more that 1 CR at the age of 18.This will allow Siya to handle expenses such as higher education, travel and marriage herself.But what if Siya does not use this 1 crore rupees properly ?To find out the answer to this question, follow  for the next part.

description: Bengaluru experienced a remarkable celestial event known as 'Zero Shadow Day' on Wednesday 24/4/2024, during which all vertical structures in the city casted no shadow for certain minutes.The Astronomical Society of India explains that due to the Earth's axial tilt of 23.5 degrees, the Sun never directly aligns above us. This alignment causes shadows to almost disappear during 'zero shadow days', making it a rare visual treat. Cities like Chennai and Mangaluru, situated on the same latitude, also experience similar phenomena on this date but at different times. day

description: Delicious Chilli Tomato Sauce 😋 Recipe 👇👇💕 This is an easy method to make Chilli Tomato Sauce at home and tastes perfect even without any additional ingredients. Since this contains very less quantity of sugar and no other chemicals, it's undoubtedly healthy.🍅 It's quite a simple recipe. If you just want tomato sauce, you can skip the red and green chilies, and reduce the amount of chilies if you want it to be less spicier or increase it if you want it more spicy.Don't believe me, just flip around and look at the ingredients mentioned on your favourite brand of tomato or chili tomato sauce, almost all popular brands are the same, tomato is just 25-28% whereas sugar constitutes the remaining 60-70% and then other chemicals that includes preservatives, artificial tastemakers and colors.Now try this recipe and find yourself savoring the best chilli tomato or tomato sauce ever, it is definitely finger licking good 😊😋Ingredients:Z☘️ 3 large tomatoes, chopped☘️ 1 green chilli☘️ 2 Red Chillies (1 is enough for less spice)☘️ 1 tsp peppercorns☘️ ½ onion,  chopped☘️ 4-5 cloves of garlic☘️ 1-inch piece of ginger, grated☘️ Salt to taste☘️ 1 tbsp sugar ☘️ 1 tbsp VinegarMethod:🍁 Heat a pan over medium heat.🍁 Add tomatoes, green chilli, peppercorns, onion, garlic, red chillies.🍁 Cook until tomatoes are soft and mushy, stirring occasionally.🍁 Then remove the pan from heat and let the mixture cool down completely.🍁 Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.🍁 Now using a strainer, filter the mixture and add it to the pan.🍁 Cook for another 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens to your desired consistency.🍁 Continued in the comments section...............................................

description: India's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Ambassador Ruchira Kamboj, addressed the Inter-Governmental Negotiations on Security Council Reforms, emphasising the urgent need for comprehensive reform within the UN body.She pointed out the significant disparity where the decisions of the five permanent members hold more weight than the combined interests of the other 188 member states. description: Each effort to free myself only tightens the constraints that bind me, turning pain into both my constant companion and my tormentor.This trap wasn’t meant to be a prison, yet here I am, confined and suffocating under its hold. With every breath, the walls seem to close in a bit more, and every attempt to save myself only invites more suffering.I sometimes wonder if letting go might lessen the pain, if there might be peace in surrender when all resistance brings only more agony. Yet, something deep within me resists the urge to give up, clinging to a sliver of hope in what feels like a hopeless situation.Caught between the urge to fight and the reality of my challenges, I uncover a raw, undeniable truth about my strength and my limitations. This understanding doesn’t just prepare me to face the present; it ignites a small flame of hope that perhaps, with time and self-compassion, I might find ways to turn these struggles into steps toward freedom.It’s not just about escaping the struggle but learning how to navigate and grow from it, transforming pain into a testament of my strength and resilience.     awareness
